- Bottom chain: r (dark red, ~38,38), p (purple square, ~42,42), G (gray diamond, ~48,54)

But the system also says "terminal_node: 5", which means node 5 is considered terminal (no untried actions left). This is confusing because I haven't tried all possible actions from node 5.
Let me try a different approach. Let me try clicking on the bottom chain objects from node 19. Specifically, let me try clicking on the dark red object (38, 38).
